subcodes.first_line: In this day the streams of divine bounty floweth from the right hand of the Throne of the All-Merciful, and the heaven of utterance is adorned with the stars of inner meaning [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز فرات فیض الهی از یمین عرش رحمانی جاری و آسمان بیان بانجم معانی مزین
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @rejection of Muhammad, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @personal instructions, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement
